title: Vercel Operations-Web PM Intake Route Promotion
objective: Promote current origin/clean-main to the existing operations-web Vercel production alias so /pm-review/import-approval-readiness is hosted, while keeping backend, schema, auth, ingress, and business-state authority unchanged.

target_project.root_directory_note: Existing Vercel project root must remain aligned with apex-power-ops-platform/apps/operations-web for the current workspace layout.

current_evidence: PM Lane 040 added /pm-review/import-approval-readiness locally and pushed it to origin/clean-main at ee214d9559ed5d0ebc2fa4311def407a3711c390.
PM Lane 041 read-only hosted smoke shows /pm-review/import-candidate and /pm-review/import-admission-plan pass on operations.apexpowerops.com.
PM Lane 041 read-only hosted smoke shows /pm-review/import-approval-readiness returns 404 on operations.apexpowerops.com.
The local coordinator workspace has no Vercel CLI binary, no VERCEL_* env names, and pnpm dlx vercel whoami timed out waiting for authentication.
required_executor_capability: Authenticated Vercel dashboard, CLI, or equivalent control surface for the existing operations-web production project.
Ability to deploy or promote current origin/clean-main for the existing project and alias without creating a new project or changing DNS.
Ability to inspect deployment build output enough to confirm /pm-review/import-approval-readiness is included.
allowed_runtime_actions: Inspect the existing Vercel project serving https://operations.apexpowerops.com.
Confirm the deployment source is repository jasonlswenson-sys/apex-power-ops on branch clean-main at or after ee214d9559ed5d0ebc2fa4311def407a3711c390.
Confirm the project root/build settings still target operations-web and do not upload unrelated repo content beyond the existing deployment contract.
Deploy or promote current clean-main to the existing production alias.
Run hosted route smoke and PM intake hosted smoke after promotion.
Update only closeout/status surfaces with exact deployment evidence and route-smoke results.
not_allowed: No product code change unless the hosted build fails from a product-code bug and the coordinator opens a new packet.
validation_steps: Confirm hosted deployment source commit is at or after ee214d9559ed5d0ebc2fa4311def407a3711c390.
corepack pnpm --dir C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform --filter @apex/operations-web smoke:hosted -- --base-url https://operations.apexpowerops.com

corepack pnpm --dir C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform --filter @apex/operations-web exec node scripts/smoke-pm-intake-hosted.mjs --operations-web-base-url https://operations.apexpowerops.com --mutation-seam-base-url https://mutation-seam.apexpowerops.com --timeout-ms 20000
success_criteria: https://operations.apexpowerops.com/pm-review/import-approval-readiness returns HTML with the expected route marker.
operations-web hosted route smoke includes and passes the import-approval-readiness route.
The paired PM intake hosted smoke no longer reports an operations-web 404 for import approval readiness.
Any remaining PM intake hosted smoke failures are mutation-seam-only and are handed to PM Lane 041B.
stop_conditions: The project would require a new Vercel project, DNS change, auth widening, preview-protection change, or root-directory change outside the existing contract.
The hosted build fails from a product-code issue that requires repo changes.
The requested proof would require Render access, backend mutation, SQL, schema migration, or live business-state mutation.
